item.title: Show HN: Lite Agent redefines what an AI agent is
item.description: Show HN: Lite Agent redefines what an AI agent is
item.dc:creator: Diana Reeves

item.title: Why you still need POP3 if you truly value privacy
item.description:
I've always been surprised by the attitude towards the POP3 protocol online. I decided to look closer, and here is what I found:

From my observations, this attitude is expressed through the continuous broadcasting of several myths. The most common one is that "POP3 is obsolete." Second is the myth that if you use POP3, you can only read your mail on a single device.
item.content:encoded:
I've always been surprised by the attitude towards the POP3 protocol online. I decided to look closer, and here is what I found:

From my observations, this attitude is expressed through the continuous broadcasting of several myths. The most common one is that "POP3 is obsolete." Second is the myth that if you use POP3, you can only read your mail on a single device.
item.dc:creator: Diana Reeves

item.title: Name a more pe**phillic government I will wait. POTUS has banned UFC wrestler because he demanded Epstein files investigation and arrests
item.description: submitted by
item.content:encoded: submitted by
item.dc:creator: Casey North

item.title: Lebanon's President Blasts Iran, Hezbollah For Using Country As Bargaining Chip
item.description:
Lebanon's President Blasts Iran, Hezbollah For Using Country As Bargaining Chip

Lebanon's president has angrily lashed out at both Hezbollah and Iran - the latter for using the Lebanese nation and people as a bargaining chip in the war and standoff with the United States and Israel.

President Joseph Aoun told CNN in a rare interview that Tehran is exploiting
item.content:encoded:
Lebanon's President Blasts Iran, Hezbollah For Using Country As Bargaining Chip

Lebanon's president has angrily lashed out at both Hezbollah and Iran - the latter for using the Lebanese nation and people as a bargaining chip in the war and standoff with the United States and Israel.

President Joseph Aoun told CNN in a rare interview that Tehran is exploiting
item.dc:creator: Rafael Reyes

When has the Senate ever not increased government spy powers? When President Trump installs Bill Pulte as acting DNI and instructs him to start kicking hornet nests, apparently.

In a WSJ

This aggressive move comes as the Senate early Friday morning b
item.content:encoded:

item.title: Rubio Backs Bolivia's Government As Protests Trigger Food, Fuel Shortages
item.description:
Rubio Backs Bolivia's Government As Protests Trigger Food, Fuel Shortages

U.S. Secretary of State Marco Rubio spoke with Bolivian President Rodrigo Paz on June 4 and discussed efforts to address growing shortages caused by nationwide unrest.

“The Secretary noted the United States is ramping up emergency assistance and logistics operations support in Bolivia to help th
item.content:encoded:
Rubio Backs Bolivia's Government As Protests Trigger Food, Fuel Shortages

U.S. Secretary of State Marco Rubio spoke with Bolivian President Rodrigo Paz on June 4 and discussed efforts to address growing shortages caused by nationwide unrest.

“The Secretary noted the United States is ramping up emergency assistance and logistics operations support in Bolivia to help th
item.dc:creator: Diana Reeves

item.title: Your phone is about to stop being yours. — Starting September 2026, a silent update, nonconsensually pushed by Google, will block every Android app whose developer hasn't registered with Google, signed their contract, paid up, and handed over government ID.

item.title: The Foreign Intelligence Accountability Act was rejected by the Senate today (June 5th, 2026)
item.description:
I personally don't know a lot about this bill, and I'm curious about how others feel about it.

First of all, the actual bill (S. 1318) is titled Fallen Servicemembers Religious Heritage Restoration Act and has absolutely nothing to do with privacy or surveillance. However there are two amendments to this bill:

  • Foreign Intelligence Accoun
item.content:encoded:
I personally don't know a lot about this bill, and I'm curious about how others feel about it.

First of all, the actual bill (S. 1318) is titled Fallen Servicemembers Religious Heritage Restoration Act and has absolutely nothing to do with privacy or surveillance. However there are two amendments to this bill:

  • Foreign Intelligence Accoun
item.dc:creator: Marcus Webb

item.title: ISS Astronauts Told To Prepare For Possible Evacuation As Air Leak Worsens
item.description:
ISS Astronauts Told To Prepare For Possible Evacuation As Air Leak Worsens

NASA senior adviser and press secretary Bethany Stevens wrote on X that astronauts aboard the International Space Station have quickly shifted into SpaceX's Dragon spacecraft and are prepared to evacuate if needed, after cracks and leaks in the Zvezda service module transfer tunnel appeared to worsen.

"The Zvezda service module transfer tunnel, known as PrK, has suffered from cracks a
item.content:encoded:
ISS Astronauts Told To Prepare For Possible Evacuation As Air Leak Worsens

NASA senior adviser and press secretary Bethany Stevens wrote on X that astronauts aboard the International Space Station have quickly shifted into SpaceX's Dragon spacecraft and are prepared to evacuate if needed, after cracks and leaks in the Zvezda service module transfer tunnel appeared to worsen.

"The Zvezda service module transfer tunnel, known as PrK, has suffered from cracks a
item.dc:creator: Diana Reeves

item.title: Trump Softens Red Line: 'No Reason' To Retrieve Iran's Nuclear 'Dust' As It's Effectively 'Entombed'
item.description:
Trump Softens Red Line: 'No Reason' To Retrieve Iran's Nuclear 'Dust' As It's Effectively 'Entombed'

Summary

  • Trump remarks suggest the fate of Iran's stockpile of enriched uranium is no longer be the central issue it once was.
  • Hezbollah chief rejects outcome of Lebanon-Israel talks, insisting that a truce must encompass whole country.
  • WSJ reports that the White House intends to
item.content:encoded:
Trump Softens Red Line: 'No Reason' To Retrieve Iran's Nuclear 'Dust' As It's Effectively 'Entombed'

Summary

  • Trump remarks suggest the fate of Iran's stockpile of enriched uranium is no longer be the central issue it once was.
  • Hezbollah chief rejects outcome of Lebanon-Israel talks, insisting that a truce must encompass whole country.
  • WSJ reports that the White House intends to
item.dc:creator: Rafael Reyes

item.title: Peace Talks Stall: U.S. Denies Iranian Claims Of Warning Shots At Destroyers
item.description:
Peace Talks Stall: U.S. Denies Iranian Claims Of Warning Shots At Destroyers

Summary:

  • U.S. CENTCOM Denies Report
  • Iran Military Fires "Warning Missiles" At US Destroyers In Gulf of Oman
  • Iran FM Warns American Bases Are Legitimate Targets, Cites 'No Tangible Progress' In Talks

Polymarket

  • Nestle CEO Warns Against Swiss Population Cap Vote

item.content:encoded:
Globalist CEOs Sound Alarm Over Swiss Population Cap Vote

Summary:

  • Increasing Number of Globalist CEOs Concerned About Swiss Population Vote

item.title: Wagyu XMR1 price manipulators finally exposed - Hyperliquid mafia
item.description:
WAGYU SCAMMERS EXPOSED

. XMR1 is a synthetic derivative. Because real Monero is private, there is ZERO public on-chain proof that these wrapped tokens are backed 1:1 by real reserves. It’s a printing press with no oversight.
4/4 The Impact: Crashing the Real MarketWhen these 5 wallets coordinate massive selling swaps o
item.content:encoded:

item.title: Rubio: 'Most Of The World Assesses' That Israel Has Nuclear Weapons
item.description:
Rubio: 'Most Of The World Assesses' That Israel Has Nuclear Weapons

whether Israel has nuclear weapons and acknowledged that "most of the world assesses that they do," but also reaffirmed the US policy of not acknowledging the existence of Israel’s nuclear stockpile and secret weapons program.

Rubio made the comments when being questioned by Rep. Joaquin Castro (D-TX), who recently led a letter to the State Department asking for answers
item.content:encoded:
Rubio: 'Most Of The World Assesses' That Israel Has Nuclear Weapons

whether Israel has nuclear weapons and acknowledged that "most of the world assesses that they do," but also reaffirmed the US policy of not acknowledging the existence of Israel’s nuclear stockpile and secret weapons program.

Rubio made the comments when being questioned by Rep. Joaquin Castro (D-TX), who recently led a letter to the State Department asking for answers
item.dc:creator: Jordan Calloway

item.title: Here Announces Unaudited Financial Results for the Third Quarter of Fiscal Year 2026
item.description: BEIJING, June 05, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Here Group Limited (NASDAQ: HERE) (“Here” or the “Company”), an IP1-based pop toy company dedicated to creating beloved collectibles and trend-defining experiences, today announced its unaudited financial results for the third quarter of the fiscal year ending June 30, 2026 (the “third quarter of FY 2026”, which refers to the quarter from January 1, 202
item.content:encoded: BEIJING, June 05, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Here Group Limited (NASDAQ: HERE) (“Here” or the “Company”), an IP1-based pop toy company dedicated to creating beloved collectibles and trend-defining experiences, today announced its unaudited financial results for the third quarter of the fiscal year ending June 30, 2026 (the “third quarter of FY 2026”, which refers to the quarter from January 1, 202
item.dc:creator: Diana Reeves

item.title: Beijing Bans Four New Zealand MPs For "Crossing Red Line" With Taiwan Visit
item.description:
Beijing Bans Four New Zealand MPs For "Crossing Red Line" With Taiwan Visit

In a first, China has banned four New Zealand Members of Parliament for a year over their visit to Taiwan, New Zealand's foreign ministry says. The MPs learned of the ban - which the Chinese Embassy said could be reduced or waived with an apology - when they returned from the trip in May, local media reported on Thursday.

On Thursday, Chinese foreign ministry spokeswoman Mao Ning said: “
item.content:encoded:
Beijing Bans Four New Zealand MPs For "Crossing Red Line" With Taiwan Visit

In a first, China has banned four New Zealand Members of Parliament for a year over their visit to Taiwan, New Zealand's foreign ministry says. The MPs learned of the ban - which the Chinese Embassy said could be reduced or waived with an apology - when they returned from the trip in May, local media reported on Thursday.

On Thursday, Chinese foreign ministry spokeswoman Mao Ning said: “
item.dc:creator: Rafael Reyes

item.title: What's that? I can't hear you over all the American Jews condemning Israel.
item.description:
Seems strange that the loudest voices condemning Bibi's genocide aren't coming from US Jews and Jewish organizations. If it were my people acting wild, I'd try to make sure everyone knew that it was a small minority of religious whackos and not what the rest of us believe in some way. Odd that.

submitted
item.content:encoded:
Seems strange that the loudest voices condemning Bibi's genocide aren't coming from US Jews and Jewish organizations. If it were my people acting wild, I'd try to make sure everyone knew that it was a small minority of religious whackos and not what the rest of us believe in some way. Odd that.

submitted
item.dc:creator: Casey North

item.title: Whole lot of anti-Michael Jackson posts
item.description:
You think they’d protect him if he actually were one of them, but the opposite is happening (and has happened since the first kid was put on the spot for some cash) because he never was in their club.

submitted by
item.content:encoded:
You think they’d protect him if he actually were one of them, but the opposite is happening (and has happened since the first kid was put on the spot for some cash) because he never was in their club.

submitted by

item.title: Trump Says Accountability Is Coming Over The 'Rigged' 2020 Election
item.description:
Trump Says Accountability Is Coming Over The 'Rigged' 2020 Election

In a new, wide-ranging interview on "Pod Force One" with Miranda Devine, President Donald Trump is saying out loud what he says a growing body of evidence increasingly supports: the 2020 election was rigged, the people responsible are known, and something is coming for them.
item.content:encoded:
Trump Says Accountability Is Coming Over The 'Rigged' 2020 Election

In a new, wide-ranging interview on "Pod Force One" with Miranda Devine, President Donald Trump is saying out loud what he says a growing body of evidence increasingly supports: the 2020 election was rigged, the people responsible are known, and something is coming for them.
item.dc:creator: Elena Vasquez

item.title: Rubio Says 'We Remember Their Lives And Honor Their Legacy' On Tiananmen Massacre's 37th Anniversary
item.description:
Rubio Says 'We Remember Their Lives And Honor Their Legacy' On Tiananmen Massacre's 37th Anniversary

Despite being unsuccessful in China, the protests sent shockwaves throughout the world and helped strengthen the resolve of people in other communist states, such as East Germany and Romania, also seeking liberty.

At the same time, the Chinese Communist Pa
item.content:encoded:
Rubio Says 'We Remember Their Lives And Honor Their Legacy' On Tiananmen Massacre's 37th Anniversary

Despite being unsuccessful in China, the protests sent shockwaves throughout the world and helped strengthen the resolve of people in other communist states, such as East Germany and Romania, also seeking liberty.

At the same time, the Chinese Communist Pa
item.dc:creator: Elena Vasquez

item.title: I need a easy guide for beginn ers
item.description:
Hi, I keep getting asked about online privacy by people who are waking up to the idea and have no clue.

I know the subject is very complex.

But is there an easy guide for beginners that covers some basics without scaring people away to ease them into better practices?

submitted by
item.content:encoded:
Hi, I keep getting asked about online privacy by people who are waking up to the idea and have no clue.

I know the subject is very complex.

But is there an easy guide for beginners that covers some basics without scaring people away to ease them into better practices?

submitted by
item.dc:creator: Marcus Webb

item.title: Texas AG Launches Investigation Into Glyphosate In Food
item.description:
Texas AG Launches Investigation Into Glyphosate In Food

Glyphosate is a commonly used herbicide applied to genetically engineered crops and is the main ingredient in Roundup weed
item.content:encoded:
Texas AG Launches Investigation Into Glyphosate In Food

Glyphosate is a commonly used herbicide applied to genetically engineered crops and is the main ingredient in Roundup weed

item.title: Standard Chartered Sees Bitcoin Bottom "Almost In" As Crypto Crashes To 3-Month-Lows
item.description:
Standard Chartered Sees Bitcoin Bottom "Almost In" As Crypto Crashes To 3-Month-Lows

The bank's Global Head of Digital Assets Research, Geoffrey Kendrick, said in a note entitled "The Low Is Almost In", the bitcoin market is close to a bottom, arguing that structurally resilient spot exchange-traded fund holdings and an anticipated large buyback by Stra
item.content:encoded:
Standard Chartered Sees Bitcoin Bottom "Almost In" As Crypto Crashes To 3-Month-Lows

The bank's Global Head of Digital Assets Research, Geoffrey Kendrick, said in a note entitled "The Low Is Almost In", the bitcoin market is close to a bottom, arguing that structurally resilient spot exchange-traded fund holdings and an anticipated large buyback by Stra
item.dc:creator: Diana Reeves

item.title: For those keeping count...it's still zero.
item.description: Rule 10 Submission Statement: The United States has made exactly two major arrests directly connected to the Jeffrey Epstein sex-trafficking ring: Epstein himself and his primary accomplice, Ghislaine Maxwell. Despite resignations and arrests all over the world, there have been zero arrests since the limited release of the Epstein Files
item.content:encoded: Rule 10 Submission Statement: The United States has made exactly two major arrests directly connected to the Jeffrey Epstein sex-trafficking ring: Epstein himself and his primary accomplice, Ghislaine Maxwell. Despite resignations and arrests all over the world, there have been zero arrests since the limited release of the Epstein Files
item.dc:creator: Sam Okafor

item.title: Satellite Imagery Appears To Show Damage At US Airbase In Kuwait After Iranian Attack
item.description:
Satellite Imagery Appears To Show Damage At US Airbase In Kuwait After Iranian Attack

Soar Atlas seems to show a destroyed shelter at the US Ali Al Salem Air Base, despite US Central Command (CENTCOM) insisting that all the missiles and drones targeting the site were "defeated".
item.content:encoded:
Satellite Imagery Appears To Show Damage At US Airbase In Kuwait After Iranian Attack

Soar Atlas seems to show a destroyed shelter at the US Ali Al Salem Air Base, despite US Central Command (CENTCOM) insisting that all the missiles and drones targeting the site were "defeated".
item.dc:creator: Elena Vasquez

item.title: John Bolton To Plead Guilty In Documents Case, Pay $2M Fine: Report
item.description:
John Bolton To Plead Guilty In Documents Case, Pay $2M Fine: Report

John Bolton, former national security adviser to President Donald Trump, has reached a plea deal with federal prosecutors and is expected to plead guilty to one count of illegal retention of sensitive national security documents, according to

Under the agreement, Bolton
item.content:encoded:
John Bolton To Plead Guilty In Documents Case, Pay $2M Fine: Report

John Bolton, former national security adviser to President Donald Trump, has reached a plea deal with federal prosecutors and is expected to plead guilty to one count of illegal retention of sensitive national security documents, according to

Under the agreement, Bolton
item.dc:creator: Diana Reeves

item.title: BBC Sinks To A New Low...
item.description:
BBC Sinks To A New Low...

On its flagship evening news show Newsnight, presenter Matt Chorley repeatedly claimed Reform UK leader Nigel Farage called for a "white cold rage" in response to the murder of 18-year-old student Henry Nowak.

Yet Farage said no such thing. He called for "pure cold rage" - a measured, determined push
item.content:encoded:
BBC Sinks To A New Low...

On its flagship evening news show Newsnight, presenter Matt Chorley repeatedly claimed Reform UK leader Nigel Farage called for a "white cold rage" in response to the murder of 18-year-old student Henry Nowak.

Yet Farage said no such thing. He called for "pure cold rage" - a measured, determined push
item.dc:creator: Sam Okafor

item.title: Privacy problems with living with others and Meta Ai and Gemini blocking
item.description:
Hey all, I'm someome who recently started taking their privacy seriously, but I've been having problems with my parents' usage of onnline services and want some help.

So with recent advancements in AI and adding it to everything, my worst fear has come true; my old parents have discovered AI and started using them.

Context: My sister who lives in a different
item.content:encoded:
Hey all, I'm someome who recently started taking their privacy seriously, but I've been having problems with my parents' usage of onnline services and want some help.

So with recent advancements in AI and adding it to everything, my worst fear has come true; my old parents have discovered AI and started using them.

Context: My sister who lives in a different
item.dc:creator: Marcus Webb
